data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an 'Equipment on-site log' as part of the requirements. However, the linked use case does not mention any functionality or data related to an equipment log, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of this critical feature means the requirement is not satisfied, leading to a failed validation.
gaps: No evidence of an 'Equipment on-site log' feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
